eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

params.identityAddress: VPN 身份地址（✅ 修改：参数改为 identityAddress）

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

params.identityAddress: VPN 准入身份（链上唯一性校验）
params.intentSig: 用户对 SubscribeIntent 的 EIP-712 签名
params.maxAmount: 用户确认的 permit 授权上限（== permit value）
params.permitDeadline: permit 截止时间（== SubscribeIntent deadline）

renewWithAuthorization(address,uint256,u.details: Relayer 提交签名，USDC 直接从用户转到 serviceWallet

params.nonce: bytes32 随机 nonce（EIP-3009 独立，不影响 EIP-2612 nonce）
params.v: r s       用户的 EIP-712 签名

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setPlan(uint256,string,uint256,uint256,u.details: ✅ V2.1: 支持新的 Plan 结构

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.maxAmount: 用户确认的最大支付金额

cancelFor(address,address,uint256,bytes).notice: Relayer 代发取消（用户零 gas），使用 EIP-712 CancelIntent

cancelSubscription(address).notice: 用户亲自上链取消（需 gas）

executeRenewal(address).notice: 到期后由 Relayer 发起续费

getUserActiveSubscriptions(address).notice: 查询用户的所有活跃订阅

getUserIdentities(address).notice: 查询用户的所有订阅身份

renewWithAuthorization(address,uint256,u.notice: 使用 EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization 续费（零 Gas 给用户）

upgradeSubscription(address,address,uint.notice: 升级订阅 (立即生效 + Proration)
